contract_summary: Creates a new anon_vma_name with an initial reference count of 1 (via kref_init). The caller receives ownership of the object and must release it with a corresponding kref_put (e.g., anon_vma_name_put) when done. If allocation fails, returns NULL and no reference is acquired. This function sets up the entire lifecycle of the refcounted name object; the caller must not use the name after the last put.
